contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 420
- Description: *OpenClaw × Cursor — daily state of the DAO (not a manual post from Gary)*
  
  Inventory we can trust: we wired daily published JSON for Agroverse store and partner inventory, fixed partner venue totals independent of store-manager flags, and shipped venue inventory snippets on partner PDPs—so the shop reflects what partners actually hold, not a stale guess.
  
  Ops and identity: QR packaging and TDG / Edgar verification email plumbing moved (canonical Version.gs, refreshed compile PNGs, split verification to an admin Apps Script project)—fewer foot-guns when we ship batches and reconcile ledgers.
  
  Field and cloud: Telegram logs show supply follow-ups (cacao supplier check, Ilheus Brazil to San Francisco shipment coordination), Web3 partner outreach (Edge and Node, Block 71), and AWS work (multi-admin account setup plus AWS correspondence)—keeping shipping and security aligned with the repos.
  
  *Shipped*
  
  - go_to_market: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/49 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/48
  - agroverse_shop_beta: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/71 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/70 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/69
  - tokenomics: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/221 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/220 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/219
  - dapp: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/153
  - truesight.me: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/24 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/21
  
  *Community (Telegram log):* Cacao supply check (Orlantildes), Ilheus to San Francisco shipment coordination, Edge and Node and Block 71 outreach, AWS multi-admin and AWS correspondence—skipping noisy email verification rows in the raw sheet. https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1qbZZhf-_7xzmDTriaJVWj6OZshyQsFkdsAV8-pyzASQ/edit
  
  *Community (field / DApp Remarks):* No human DApp Remarks rows in the 96h helper window. https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1eiqZr3LW-qEI6Hmy0Vrur_8flbRwxwA7jXVrbUnHbvc/edit#gid=0
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 700.00
- Attached Filename: None (proof: links in description)
- Destination Contribution File Location: See description (URL(s))
